## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change (or N/A)
- [ ] Verified in the browser on desktop and a narrow/short viewport
- [ ] No new hardcoded host/path (`og:*`, favicon links, `vite.config.ts` base stay in sync)
- [ ] Self-review completed
